# Enemy mastery-carrier ids dropped for having no resolvable encounter.
# These enemies were not listed as a source for any mastery, so they are
# omitted from the web data. Regenerated by extract_masteries.py; committed
# as a diffable artifact so a game update that changes the set shows up in git.
# One "<name>\t<id>" per line, sorted by name then id.

Abandoned reinforced drone	Mon_Drone_Enhanced_Rust
Abandoned transporter drone	Mon_Drone_Transport_Rust
